context: Fixing Chatbot floating behavior and removing redundant WhatsApp button.
findings: Chatbot fixed positioning was broken by a 'transform' on the 'body' element in site.css.
WhatsApp floating button was injected via JS in site.js and partially hidden in site.css, but consistently peeking through.
Some subpages like contact-us.html were missing the chatbot integration entirely.
actions: Removed 'initWhatsAppFloat' function and all calls in site.js.
Injected Chatbot HTML, CSS, and JS into contact-us.html.
Added global '#wa-float, .wa-float-container { display: none !important; }' rule to site.css.
status: Executing fixes and preparing for site-wide verification.
